message:
🌱 Add podman-container-tools: Support special IP designator `host-gateway` in mission (#1184)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "podman-container-tools-14390-support-special-ip-designator-host-gateway-in-add-h",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "podman-container-tools: Support special IP designator `host-gateway` in `--add-host`.",
+    "description": "Support special IP designator `host-gateway` in `--add-host`.. Requested by 8+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current podman-container-tools setup",
+        "description": "Verify your podman-container-tools version and configuration:\n```bash\npodman --version\n```\nThis feature requires a working podman-container-tools installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review podman-container-tools configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant podman-container-tools configuration:\n**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**\r\n\n**Description**\n\nRelated: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/8466\n\nPodman doesn't support `host-gateway` as a special IP designator when creating a container."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support special IP designator `host-gateway` in…",
+        "description": "Implements the behavior described in https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/14390 (feature request).\n\n`host-gateway` is a special designator used in the IP address position of `--add-host` entries. It maps to the container's `host.containers.internal` IP address. moby-engine/docker CLI\n```yaml\n$ podman run --rm --add-host foobar:host-gateway fedora\nError: invalid IP address in add-host: \"host-gateway\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support special IP designator `host-gateway` in…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Implements the behavior described in https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/14390 (feature request).\n\n`host-gateway` is a special designator used in the IP address position of `--add-host` entries. It maps to the container's `host.containers.internal` IP address. moby-engine/docker CLI implement this same option.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "$ podman run --rm --add-host foobar:host-gateway fedora\nError: invalid IP address in add-host: \"host-gateway\"",
+        "$ docker run --add-host foobar:host-gateway -it fedora\n[root@87ec49b55693 /]# cat /etc/hosts\n127.0.0.1       localhost\n::1     localhost ip6-localhost ip6-loopback\nfe00::0 ip6-localnet\nff00::0 ip6-mcastprefix\nff02::1 ip6-allnodes\nff02::2 ip6-allrouters\n172.17.0.1      foobar\n172.17.0.2      87ec49b55693",
+        "$ bin/podman run -it --rm --add-host testhostname:host-gateway alpine   \n/ # cat /etc/hosts\n192.168.1.228   testhostname\n127.0.0.1       localhost\n::1     localhost\n192.168.1.228   host.containers.internal\n10.0.2.100      1b6fcb8904fe vibrant_wescoff\n/ # ping testhostname\nPING testhostname (192.168.1.228): 56 data bytes\n64 bytes from 192.168.1.228: seq=0 ttl=42 time=0.135 ms"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
